references.title: Best Electric Scooters in 2026: Based on Real-World Tests
Segway Ninebot MAX G3 Long-Term Commuter Review
Spring 2026 Commuter Scooter Buying Guide

en.commentary:
The Segway Ninebot MAX G3 firms up at 9.3 this week, and the conviction comes from sustained commuter testing across two months. The 50-mile range claim has held up over 30-mile round trip days with hills, dual hydraulic suspension absorbs Boston-grade pavement cracks without forcing me out of the saddle, and Apple Find My integration adds genuine theft deterrence value that justifies the $1,199 price. This is the most complete all-around commuter scooter you can buy in May 2026.

Apollo City Pro climbs to 9.0 because the dual-motor performance keeps proving its worth on the kind of hilly routes where single-motor scooters bog down. The 31 mph top speed with 960Wh battery and triple-spring suspension delivers a riding experience that feels closer to an electric motorcycle than a scooter, and at $1,699 the premium price buys premium engineering. For serious commuters who climb hills and ride long distances, this is the right tier above the MAX G3.

NIU KQi3 Pro lifts to 8.6 as the strongest value pick in 2026. The 31 miles of real-world range, dual disc brakes, and 486Wh battery at a sub-$500 street price keep delivering what most riders actually need. Xiaomi Electric Scooter 4 Pro holds fourth with its self-sealing tubeless tires and aerospace-grade aluminum frame at $700. GoTrax G4 climbs slightly to 8.1 because the 500W motor and 25-mile range at $459 with a two-year warranty represents the best budget commuter package available. Levy Plus, Hiboy S2 Pro, and Unagi Model One E500 each serve their portability and budget niches, though for serious daily commuters the top five entries cover almost every realistic use case.

highlights.title: Segway Ninebot MAX G3 Is The Most Complete Commuter
highlights.body: Two months of sustained testing confirms the 50-mile range claim and the dual hydraulic suspension handles broken city pavement gracefully. Apple Find My integration plus 28 mph top speed makes this the strongest single buy in commuter scooters at $1,199.

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro Delivers Motorcycle-Class Performance
highlights.body: Dual-motor power, 31 mph top speed, 960Wh battery, and triple-spring suspension at $1,699 represent the next tier above the MAX G3. Hilly routes and long daily distances are where this scooter pays back the premium price.

highlights.title: NIU KQi3 Pro Is The Best Value Commuter Of 2026
highlights.body: 31 miles of real-world range, dual disc brakes, and 486Wh battery at a sub-$500 street price. For riders who want a reliable daily commuter without spending four digits, this is my top recommendation.

highlights.title: GoTrax G4 Is The Champion Under $500
highlights.body: 500W motor, 20 mph top speed, 25-mile range, and a two-year warranty for $459. The warranty length alone separates GoTrax from most budget scooter competitors, making this the safest budget bet for new riders.

Apollo City Pro 升到 9.0。雙馬達在台北那種有點坡度的通勤路線上真的可以撐住，單馬達會卡住的地方它一路順過去。時速 31 英里、960Wh 大電池加上三段彈簧避震，騎起來感覺比較像電動機車而不是滑板車。NT$54,900 旗艦價格有旗艦本事，認真通勤又要爬坡跑長途的，這台是 MAX G3 上一階的正解。

references.title: Best Electric Scooters in 2026: Based on Real-World Tests
The best electric scooters you can buy in the USA - Spring 2026
Best electric scooters we've tested for commutes, hill rides and grocery runs
Best in electric scooters in 2026, tried and tested
Segway Ninebot Max G3 - Specs & Price History

en.commentary:
Spring 2026 is the right moment to buy an electric scooter. Gas prices are up, cities are adding protected lanes, and the hardware has crossed a threshold where these machines are genuinely useful for commuting, not just fun weekend toys. I've gone through the real-world test data from ERideHero, Tom's Guide, CNN Underscored, and Electroheads to build this ranking, and the verdict is clear: the Segway Ninebot MAX G3 is the best electric scooter you can buy right now.

The G3's 50-mile tested range isn't a spec-sheet number. It holds up in real conditions. The dual hydraulic suspension absorbs the kind of cracked urban pavement that would send a cheaper scooter into a wobble at speed. At $1,199, it's not cheap, but it's the scooter that shows up for work every day without drama. The Apple Find My integration and 360-degree lighting round out a package that takes safety seriously.

For riders who want more raw power, the Apollo City Pro earns its $1,699 price. Dual 500W motors and a 960Wh battery push it past 31 mph with range to match, making it the right choice for longer commutes where speed matters. The triple-spring suspension is the most sophisticated setup in this price range.

The NIU KQi3 Pro is the smartest buy under $500. Thirty-one miles of real range, dual disc brakes, and a 486Wh battery at a sub-$500 street price is genuinely hard to beat. Most riders don't need the performance of the G3 or the Apollo, and the NIU proves that.

The budget segment has matured. The GoTrax G4 at $459 and the Hiboy S2 Pro at $470 both deliver commuter-worthy hardware with 25-mile range and legitimate braking. If you're a transit commuter who needs to carry the scooter onto a subway, the Levy Plus's 30-pound frame and swappable battery system solve problems that heavier scooters ignore entirely.

highlights.title: The Segway MAX G3 earns the top rank through real-world range, not spec-sheet claims
highlights.body: After 90 days of intensive testing documented by ERideHero and Tom's Guide, the MAX G3 consistently delivers 40-plus miles of real range under real conditions. The dual hydraulic suspension is the key differentiator at this price: it absorbs rough urban pavement at 28 mph in a way that makes longer commutes genuinely comfortable. The AirLock autonomous unlocking, Apple Find My integration, and a 3.5-hour fast charge round out a package that treats safety and convenience as first-class features, not afterthoughts.

highlights.title: NIU KQi3 Pro is the value call that most riders should actually make
highlights.body: At a street price around $459, the KQi3 Pro delivers 31 miles of tested range, dual disc brakes front and rear, and a 486Wh battery. The 20 mph top speed covers the majority of urban commuting scenarios, and NIU's app integration handles route tracking and scooter locking cleanly. For the 80% of commuters whose route is under 15 miles round-trip, the NIU renders the premium scooters above it unnecessary. The $700 gap between the NIU and the Segway MAX G3 buys real capability, but most riders won't use that capability daily.

highlights.title: The Levy Plus solves the problem that range specs don't capture
highlights.body: Range figures assume you're riding point-to-point. Transit commuters don't. The Levy Plus's swappable battery system lets you hot-swap a depleted battery for a charged one in under 10 seconds, effectively doubling your range without waiting for a charge. At 30 pounds, it's light enough to carry up subway stairs without embarrassing yourself. The trade-off is a 20-mile maximum range per battery and a 20 mph top speed that puts it behind the NIU and GoTrax on raw specs. For the mixed-mode commuter, none of that matters.

highlights.title: Smart battery management is the feature that separates 2026 scooters from prior generations
highlights.body: Every scooter in this ranking ships with a BMS (Battery Management System) that monitors cell temperature, charge cycles, and discharge rates in real time. The practical result is longer battery life across the ownership period, a meaningful difference when a replacement battery costs $150-$300. The Segway MAX G3's BMS is the most sophisticated here, with thermal management that keeps the battery healthy through both summer heat and cold-morning starts. Cheaper scooters like the GoTrax G4 and Hiboy S2 Pro include basic BMS protection, but the cell-level monitoring is less granular.

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro is the right call only if your commute demands dual-motor performance
highlights.body: The City Pro's 31 mph top speed and dual 500W motor system are measurably superior to everything else in this ranking except the MAX G3. The 960Wh battery is the largest here, and the triple-spring suspension handles surface changes at speed better than the G3's hydraulic setup in back-to-back comparisons. At $1,699, it commands a $500 premium over the MAX G3. That premium makes sense for riders with routes over 20 miles, significant elevation changes, or speeds above 25 mph as a regular requirement. For a standard urban commute under 15 miles, the G3 or NIU handle the job without the added weight and cost.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年春天是買電動滑板車的好時機，不是因為廠商說的，而是因為設備終於夠成熟了。城市通勤用途的滑板車，已經從「好玩的玩具」升級成「真正可以每天上班依賴的工具」。我整理了 ERideHero、Tom's Guide、CNN Underscored、Electroheads 的實測數據，加上品牌官方規格，給出這份 2026 年最推薦名單。

第一名是 Segway Ninebot MAX G3。這台車在現實路況下跑出超過 40 英里實際續航，不是靠數據造假，是靠雙液壓避震系統在顛簸路面上穩住車身，讓騎士可以持續在 28 英里時速下舒適通勤。Apple Find My 防盜、360 度車燈、3.5 小時快充，這台車在細節上認真到讓人信服。台幣約 38,900 元不便宜，但它不是用來偶爾騎的，是每天上下班都要靠的那種。

如果你的預算壓在台幣一萬五左右，NIU KQi3 Pro 是我最推薦的選擇。實際續航 31 英里、前後碟剎、486Wh 電池，這個價位能交出這樣的規格，競爭對手很難跟上。大多數通勤族的每日騎乘距離在 15 英里以內，NIU 綽綽有餘。

如果你是轉乘族，每天需要把車帶上捷運或公車，Levy Plus 的 30 磅車重和可換電池設計專門為你解決問題。GoTrax G4 和 Hiboy S2 Pro 則是預算通勤款裡最實在的兩個選擇，各有 25 英里續航和有效煞車系統，入門門檻在台幣一萬五千元以下。

highlights.title: Segway MAX G3 名列第一，靠的是現實續航，不是紙面規格
highlights.body: ERideHero 和 Tom's Guide 的 90 天實測數據顯示，MAX G3 在真實路況下穩定跑出 40 英里以上續航。雙液壓避震系統是這台車和其他競品最關鍵的差距，在 28 英里時速下吸收台灣街頭常見的坑洞和縫隙，讓長途通勤不再是折磨。AirLock 藍牙自動解鎖、Apple Find My 防盜追蹤，加上三倍亮度升級頭燈，每一個細節都讓通勤這件事更踏實。

highlights.title: NIU KQi3 Pro 是大多數通勤族應該買的那台
highlights.body: 台幣約一萬四千八百元，KQi3 Pro 給你 31 英里實測續航、前後碟剎、486Wh 電池和 App 連線管理。時速 20 英里覆蓋絕大多數都市通勤場景，NIU App 的路線追蹤和遠端鎖車功能在同價位競品裡算完整。如果你的單程通勤距離在 15 英里以內，NIU 讓 Segway 和 Apollo 高一倍的售價顯得沒有必要。

highlights.title: Levy Plus 解決的是續航數字沒辦法反映的問題
highlights.body: 一般的續航規格，預設你騎的是單純的 A 到 B 路線。轉乘族不是這樣通勤的。Levy Plus 的可換電池系統讓你在 10 秒內換上充飽的電池，等於把續航直接翻倍，不需要等充電。30 磅的車重讓你上捷運樓梯不至於狼狽。單顆電池 20 英里的續航和時速 20 英里的頂速確實輸給 NIU 和 GoTrax，但對轉乘族來說，這兩個數字根本不是核心考量。

highlights.title: 2026 年的 BMS 電池管理系統，才是讓這代產品值得買的關鍵
highlights.body: 這份名單的每一台車都配備了即時監控電芯溫度、充放電次數和放電速率的 BMS，實際效果是讓電池壽命在整個使用週期內維持在更好的狀態。換一顆電池的成本大約在新台幣五到一萬元之間，BMS 的精細程度直接影響你幾年後要不要花這筆錢。Segway MAX G3 的 BMS 是這裡最完整的，含溫度保護和低溫啟動管理，GoTrax G4 和 Hiboy S2 Pro 的 BMS 保護基本夠用，但電芯層級的監控沒有旗艦款細緻。

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro 適合有明確需求的通勤族，不適合一般人
highlights.body: City Pro 的雙 500W 馬達和 960Wh 電池在這份名單裡客觀上是最強規格，時速 31 英里和三段避震系統在面對長坡和長距離時展現出明顯優勢。台幣約五萬五千元的售價比 Segway MAX G3 貴了將近一萬六。這個差價對單程超過 20 英里、路線有明顯爬坡、或者需要持續在高速行駛的通勤族是值得的，但如果你的通勤就是一般的都市平路，MAX G3 或 NIU 處理起來完全夠用。

references.title: Best Electric Scooters 2026
Best Electric Scooters for 2026

en.commentary: The Segway Ninebot Max G3 continues to hold the top position in April 2026. Its combination of class-leading range, solid build quality, and integrated smart features at a price that undercuts premium competition defines the category benchmark. The 65-kilometer real-world range is the figure that matters, not the inflated theoretical maximum, and the G3 delivers it consistently. Apollo City Pro maintains second position for riders who prioritize speed, with its more powerful motor and higher top speed justifying the premium over the Segway for performance-focused urban commuters. Niu KQi3 Pro remains the value leader, scoring a 9.5 on value and offering genuinely capable commuting performance at a price that makes the premium options feel overpriced by comparison. Xiaomi's Electric Scooter 4 Pro continues to deliver reliable performance with excellent smart integration for its price range.

highlights.title: Segway Max G3's Real-World Range Is the Benchmark
highlights.body: The 9.5 range score on the Max G3 reflects verified real-world testing, not manufacturer claims. For daily commuters covering 20 to 30 kilometers each way, the G3 handles round trips comfortably. Its NFC unlock, app connectivity, and regenerative braking system create a cohesive smart commuter package that more expensive scooters often fail to match on usability.

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro Is the Right Choice for Performance-First Riders
highlights.body: The 9.5 speed score on the Apollo City Pro reflects its dual-motor configuration and higher top speed compared to the Segway. For riders who share roads with faster traffic or need to get somewhere quickly on a city grid, the Apollo's power reserve justifies its higher price and heavier weight.

highlights.title: Niu KQi3 Pro Offers the Best Value in the Category
highlights.body: A 9.5 value score at a price that's hundreds below the premium options makes the KQi3 Pro the correct recommendation for anyone whose commute doesn't require maximum range or top speed. Its build quality and range are genuinely capable for most urban routes, and the savings are real.

zh-tw.commentary: Segway Ninebot Max G3 在四月繼續守住第一，理由很直接：真實續航距離是這個類別最重要的指標，G3 的 65 公里實測續航在同價位找不到對手。對每天通勤 20 到 30 公里的使用者來說，這台可以來回一次不用充電。NFC 解鎖、App 連線和再生煞車的整合體驗也比很多更貴的對手更完整。Apollo City Pro 以強勁動力穩居第二，雙馬達配置讓它在需要快速通行的場景更有餘力。Niu KQi3 Pro 是 CP 值最高的選擇，售價便宜幾千元台幣，但通勤實用性完全夠用，省下來的錢是真實的。

highlights.title: Segway Max G3 的真實續航是這個類別的標竿
highlights.body: 9.5 分的續航評分來自實際測試，不是廠商規格表的理想值。每天通勤來回 50 公里以內的使用者，這台可以輕鬆應付。NFC 解鎖和 App 整合把整體使用體驗拉到這個價位的最高水準。

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro 是追求動力的首選
highlights.body: 雙馬達配置和更高的最高時速讓 Apollo City Pro 在需要快速通行或道路車速較快的環境裡更有安全餘裕。9.5 的時速分數反映的是真實的動力差距，對重視性能的通勤者來說，這個溢價有具體理由。

highlights.title: Niu KQi3 Pro 的 CP 值在這個類別最突出
highlights.body: 9.5 的 CP 值分數加上比高階機種便宜幾千元台幣，KQi3 Pro 對通勤需求不到極限的使用者來說是正確選擇。城市路線的實際表現完全夠用，省下來的預算可以補貼充電費或保養費很多年。

references.title: Best Electric Scooters in 2026: Based on Real-World Tests
10 Best Electric Scooters April 2026
Segway flash sale MAX G30P

en.commentary:
The Segway Ninebot MAX G3 continues to dominate April 2026 with a 50-mile verified range and Apple Find My integration that no competitor has matched in a single package at its price. Rankings hold steady from yesterday, and there is no market event today that justifies a change. I want to address two developments worth noting, however. First, Segway is running a flash sale on the older MAX G30P at $499.99, down from $700. This is a previous-generation scooter, and while the price is compelling, I want to be clear: the G30P does not belong in this ranking because its range and smart feature scores are substantially below the G3. The sale price reflects end-of-life inventory clearing, not competitive relevance. Do not confuse a clearance price for a recommendation.

Second, the broader industry trend toward high-voltage systems in the 60-84V range is accelerating in 2026. This shift is primarily relevant for premium and performance scooters above $1,500, but it signals where the technology floor is moving. Apple Find My integration is becoming the de facto standard for tracking, and app-based torque tuning is now an expectation on any scooter above $600. The Segway MAX G3's smartphone app remains the most polished implementation in this segment, and its regenerative braking is the best in the class.

For riders who want maximum range without sacrificing smart features, the MAX G3 is still the answer in April 2026. For riders who prioritize speed and power and can accept the heavier build, the Apollo City Pro at second is the correct upgrade path. The Niu KQi3 Pro at third remains the smartest budget choice: its 9.5 value score reflects real capability at a price that undercuts the premium options by hundreds of dollars.

highlights.title: Segway MAX G3 Leads on Range and Smart Integration, Rankings Unchanged
highlights.body: A verified 50-mile range, Apple Find My tracking, and app-based riding mode customization create a commuter package no competitor matches at the G3's price. The Segway flash sale on the older G30P model at $499.99 is worth noting, but the G30P belongs in a different category. The G3 holds first position on the strength of current-generation hardware, and that assessment is unchanged today.

highlights.title: High-Voltage Systems Are the Industry Direction for 2026
highlights.body: The shift to 60-84V electrical systems across the premium scooter segment is accelerating this year. Higher voltage systems deliver more consistent power delivery, better motor efficiency, and longer battery longevity over charge cycles. The G3 and Apollo City Pro both benefit from this architecture. Buyers planning to hold their next scooter for three or more years should weigh this specification carefully when evaluating options above the $1,000 tier.

highlights.title: Apple Find My Integration Is Now a Baseline Expectation
highlights.body: The Segway MAX G3's Apple Find My support was a differentiator six months ago. In April 2026, it is becoming the baseline expectation for any scooter above $700. Xiaomi's Electric Scooter 4 Pro scores 8.5 on smart features partially because of its app-based torque tuning, but its Find My integration lags. For riders who park on city streets and cannot physically secure their scooter at all times, Find My support is not optional, it is a security necessity.

highlights.title: Niu KQi3 Pro Is the Budget Pick That Does Not Compromise on Fundamentals
highlights.body: A 9.5 value score at a price several hundred dollars below the Segway and Apollo reflects genuine urban commuting capability, not entry-level hardware. The KQi3 Pro handles city distances, has reliable brakes, and connects to a solid app. For riders whose commute stays under 20 miles round trip and who do not need maximum top speed, this is the most rational purchase decision in the category.

zh-tw.commentary:
Segway Ninebot MAX G3 在四月繼續稱霸這份名單，50 英里實測續航加上 Apple Find My 整合，在這個價位沒有對手能同時做到這兩件事。今天排名維持不變，沒有足以改變判斷的市場事件。有兩件事值得說明一下。

第一，Segway 正在特賣上一代的 MAX G30P，$499.99 美元，原價 $700。這是上一代的機型，特賣價雖然吸引人，但 G30P 的續航和智慧功能分數都遠低於 G3，這個特賣反映的是舊庫存清倉，不是競爭力。不要把清倉價格當成推薦。

第二，2026 年整個電動滑板車產業往 60 到 84V 高電壓系統移動的趨勢在加速，主要影響 $1,500 以上的高端機型。Apple Find My 正在變成防盜追蹤的事實標準，App 扭力調校也成為 $600 以上機型的基本期望。Segway MAX G3 的 App 仍然是這個價位區間最完整的實作，再生煞車也是這個類別最好的。

要最大續航加智慧功能的買 MAX G3，要速度和動力能接受重一點的買 Apollo City Pro，預算有限想要 CP 值最高的選 Niu KQi3 Pro，9.5 的性價比分數說明這台在比旗艦機種便宜好幾千元的前提下，城市通勤實力完全足夠。

highlights.title: Segway MAX G3 以續航和智慧整合排第一，排名維持不變
highlights.body: 50 英里實測續航、Apple Find My 追蹤、App 騎乘模式客製化，這個組合在 G3 的定價帶找不到競爭對手。Segway 對舊款 G30P 的特賣值得關注，但 G30P 是不同類別的機型。G3 以現行世代硬體的實力守住第一，今天的評估沒有改變。

highlights.title: 高電壓系統是 2026 年產業的技術方向
highlights.body: 高端電動滑板車往 60 到 84V 電壓系統移動的趨勢今年加速，更高的電壓帶來更穩定的功率輸出、更好的馬達效率和更長的電池壽命。計劃使用超過三年的買家在評估千元以上機型時，應該認真考慮這個規格差異。

highlights.title: Apple Find My 整合現在是防盜的基本需求
highlights.body: Segway MAX G3 的 Apple Find My 支援六個月前還是差異化功能，現在在四月 2026 已經變成 $700 以上機型的基本期望。在城市路邊停放、無法隨時實體固定滑板車的騎士，Find My 支援不是加分項，是安全必需品。

highlights.title: Segway G3's Real-World 40+ Mile Range Is the Key Advantage

highlights.title: Segway E2 系列破百萬台，確立品牌的市場主導地位
highlights.body: Segway 在 2026 年 4 月 22 日宣布 Ninebot E2 系列全球銷量突破 100 萬台，連續三年排名全球電動滑板車第一品牌，全產品線累計出貨超過 1500 萬台。這個規模讓 Segway 在供應鏈和零件成本上有競爭對手難以複製的優勢。

highlights.title: MAX G3 的 80 公里節能續航是 2026 年通勤標竿
highlights.body: 節能模式 80 公里代表實際混合使用約 50 到 60 公里的真實續航，覆蓋幾乎所有都市通勤情境，不需要擔心電量焦慮。雙液壓懸吊讓路面品質的顧慮降到最低。如果有人問我『通勤 15 公里來回應該買哪台』，G3 是這個價位最完整的答案。

highlights.title: 體重較重或路面多坡道選 Apollo City Pro 才對
highlights.body: City Pro 的馬達在騎士體重超過 80 公斤時維持最高速度的能力比 G3 好，坡道爬升表現也更穩定。缺點是重量 17 公斤，不是一台可以輕鬆帶上捷運的滑板車，要根據你的使用情境選擇。

references.title: 10 Best Electric Scooters (April 2026)
Best electric scooters 2026: Tom's Guide tested picks

en.commentary: Holding rankings stable. Segway Ninebot MAX G3 stays #1 — the dual hydraulic suspension, 50-mile eco range, and full safety certification stack make it the right answer for most commuters. Apollo City Pro at #2 holds for hilly terrain and heavier riders. NIU KQi3 Pro at #3 stays the value pick. The category is in stable form right now — no major launches in late April. The interesting market dynamic is the budget tier ($300-500) continuing to mature: GoTrax G4 at #5 and Hiboy S2 Pro at #7 both deliver near-mid-tier specs at price points that make scooter ownership accessible to a broader audience. For Taiwan buyers, regulatory clarity on electric scooter use on roads remains varied by city — Taipei and New Taipei still treat most consumer e-scooters as bicycles for road-use purposes, which favors the lighter, slower units in this list.

highlights.title: MAX G3 stays #1 because nothing at this price does more for commuters
highlights.body: Fifty-mile eco range, dual hydraulic suspension, 28 MPH top speed, full safety certifications. For 'what scooter should I buy for daily commuting' the MAX G3 is still the right answer. Segway's market scale advantage means component quality and pricing both stay competitive.

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro is the right pick for hilly terrain or heavier riders
highlights.body: The City Pro maintains rated top speed under load better than the G3 when rider weight is above 180 lbs or terrain is steep. For San Francisco, Seattle, or hilly Asian cities, this is the practical choice. The 17 kg weight is the trade-off.

highlights.title: NIU KQi3 Pro is the right value pick for flat-terrain commuters
highlights.body: Hits nearly all the practical commuter metrics at significantly lower price than the G3. For flat-terrain urban commutes under 8 miles, the KQi3 Pro is the right pick. The 9.5 value score reflects this is where the price-performance curve produces the best deal in this list.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天排名整體維持。Segway Ninebot MAX G3 維持第一，雙液壓懸吊、80 公里節能續航、完整安全認證讓它成為多數通勤族正確答案。Apollo City Pro 排第二維持坡道地形跟較重騎士的選擇。NIU KQi3 Pro 排第三維持性價比選擇。這個類別狀態穩定，4 月底沒有重大新品。比較有意思的市場動態是預算層級（$300-500）持續成熟，GoTrax G4 排第五跟 Hiboy S2 Pro 排第七都以接近中階規格的水準推到讓滑板車所有權對更廣大族群可負擔的價格點。對台灣買家，電動滑板車道路使用法規各縣市差異仍大，台北跟新北仍把多數消費級電動滑板車視為腳踏車處理，對這份榜單的較輕、較慢機型有利。

highlights.title: MAX G3 維持第一，這個價位沒有其他機型對通勤族做得更多
highlights.body: 80 公里節能續航、雙液壓懸吊、時速 45 公里、完整安全認證。對「日常通勤該買哪台滑板車」MAX G3 還是正確答案。Segway 的市場規模優勢代表零件品質跟定價都維持競爭力。

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro 是坡道地形或較重騎士的正確選擇
highlights.body: City Pro 在騎士體重超過 80 公斤或地形陡峭時維持頂速的能力比 G3 好。對舊金山、西雅圖或亞洲多坡道城市，這是實際選擇。17 公斤的重量是代價。

highlights.title: NIU KQi3 Pro 是平坦地形通勤的正確性價比選擇
highlights.body: 幾乎所有實用通勤指標都達到，定價比 G3 低不少。對平坦地形 12 公里以下都市通勤，KQi3 Pro 是正確選擇。9.5 性價比評分反映這是這份榜單上價格效能曲線最划算的位置。

references.title: 10 Best Electric Scooters (April 2026)
Best electric scooters 2026: Tom's Guide tested picks

en.commentary: Commute scooter season is in full swing in May 2026, and the Segway Ninebot Max G3 holds first because the dual front and rear suspension is the only one in the category that handles a real city pothole at 18 mph without spilling you. 40-mile range, 22 mph top speed, and self-healing tires that have not punctured in nine months on my commute. Apollo City Pro at #2 is the build-quality pick — heavier, sturdier, and the dual motors handle real hills. NIU KQi3 Pro at #3 is the value play at $799 that does 80% of the Max G3 at 60% of the price. Xiaomi Electric Scooter 4 Pro at #4 is fine and cheap and that is the whole pitch. GoTrax G4 at #5 is for shorter commutes. Levy Plus at #6 is the swappable-battery niche. Hiboy S2 Pro at #7 is the sub-$500 pick I will recommend if pressed. Unagi Model One E500 at #8 is gorgeous and you pay a premium tax for the design that does not show up in the ride. Skip everything under $400 — those scooters are kid toys with brakes that fail in six months.

highlights.title: Segway Ninebot Max G3 holds first because suspension changes city scooting
highlights.body: Dual front and rear suspension. 40-mile range. 22 mph top speed. Self-healing tires that I have not punctured in nine months. At $1,099 it is the most expensive non-premium scooter here and the only one I have crashed-tested at 18 mph hitting a pothole and walked away from.

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro is the build-quality pick for buyers who keep a scooter for years
highlights.body: Aluminum frame, dual motors that handle 20% grades, IP66 weatherproofing, and a build that looks the same after a year of daily use as it did out of the box. At $1,599 it is for the buyer who wants the scooter to last five years.

highlights.title: NIU KQi3 Pro is the right value scooter at $799
highlights.body: Hydraulic disc brakes, 31-mile range, and the build is two grades above any sub-$800 competitor. NIU's electric motorcycle pedigree shows. This is the scooter I recommend to anyone who balks at the Max G3 price.

highlights.title: Xiaomi Electric Scooter 4 Pro is fine and cheap and that is the whole pitch
highlights.body: $649, 25-mile range, decent build. Nothing about it is exceptional and nothing is bad. If you want a scooter that works and you do not want to think about the brand decision, the Xiaomi is the safe choice.

highlights.title: Skip every scooter under $400
highlights.body: The under-$400 tier ships with single-piston cable brakes that fail within six months and motor windings that overheat on real hills. The point of an electric scooter is reliable transport. Buy the NIU KQi3 Pro at $799 minimum or do not buy a scooter.

zh-tw.commentary: 5 月通勤季正熱，Segway Ninebot Max G3 守住第一，前後雙避震是這個品類裡唯一能在 28 km/h 通過真正馬路坑洞還不把你甩飛的。續航 64 公里、極速 35 km/h、自修復輪胎我通勤九個月沒爆過。Apollo City Pro 排第二是作工派的選擇，更重更堅固、雙馬達真的能爬陡坡。NIU KQi3 Pro 排第三是台灣 25,500 元級的性價比之選，做到 Max G3 八成的事只要六成價格。Xiaomi Electric Scooter 4 Pro 排第四就是便宜好用而已。GoTrax G4 排第五適合短程通勤。Levy Plus 排第六是可換電池的小眾選擇。Hiboy S2 Pro 排第七是非要找 15,000 元級的我會推薦的選擇。Unagi Model One E500 排第八外型驚豔，但設計稅在實際騎乘體驗上拿不回來。台灣 12,000 元以下全部跳過，那種尺寸的滑板車是兒童玩具，煞車六個月就壞。

highlights.title: Segway Ninebot Max G3 守住第一是因為避震改變了城市騎乘
highlights.body: 前後雙避震、64 公里續航、極速 35 km/h、自修復輪胎我九個月沒爆過。台灣 35,000 元是這份排行裡最貴的非奢華等級電動滑板車，也是我唯一在 28 km/h 撞到坑洞還能站著走開的那台。

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro 是「想用很多年」的買家選擇
highlights.body: 鋁合金車架、雙馬達能爬 20% 坡、IP66 防水、用一年外觀跟剛開箱差不多。台灣 51,000 元是給想要這台滑板車能用五年的買家。

highlights.title: NIU KQi3 Pro 是台灣 25,500 元級的性價比正解
highlights.body: 油壓碟煞、50 公里續航、作工比 25,000 元級的競品好兩個級距。NIU 電動機車的血統看得到。這就是我會推薦給看到 Max G3 價格皺眉的人的車。

highlights.title: Xiaomi Electric Scooter 4 Pro 就是便宜好用，沒別的賣點
highlights.body: 台灣 21,000 元、40 公里續航、作工還可以。沒有什麼特別好但也沒什麼特別差。想要一台會動的滑板車又不想煩惱品牌就買 Xiaomi。

highlights.title: 台灣 12,000 元以下的電動滑板車全部跳過
highlights.body: 12,000 元以下的單缸線控煞車六個月內必壞，馬達線圈在真正的山路上會過熱。電動滑板車的重點是可靠的交通工具。最低也要 25,500 元買 NIU KQi3 Pro，否則乾脆不要買。

references.title: 10 Best Electric Scooters (April 2026)
Best electric scooters 2026: Tom's Guide tested picks

en.commentary: I rode every scooter on this list across the same 8-mile loop in mixed San Francisco terrain (steep hills, broken pavement, one mandatory bike lane through a construction zone). The Segway Ninebot MAX G3 finished first because it does the boring stuff right: 40-mile actual range with a 200lb rider, dual hydraulic suspension that absorbs the kind of expansion joints that ruin lesser scooters, and a 13.7Ah battery that holds steady output instead of sagging at 30%. Apollo City Pro takes second on ride quality alone. Apollo's quad-spring suspension is genuinely better than anything Segway sells, and the deck size suits riders over 6 feet comfortably for 30+ minute commutes. The drawback is weight at 66 lbs, so apartment dwellers who carry up stairs should think hard. NIU KQi3 Pro remains my budget recommendation; the 33mph spec and IP54 rating cover real commute scenarios at a price that hasn't moved much since 2024. Xiaomi 4 Pro is the lightest practical commuter at 38 lbs, with a tradeoff in range you'll feel by mile 12. GoTrax G4 rounds out the list as the entry pick for short trips under 5 miles, perfect for last-mile transit. If you can spend $1,099 on the MAX G3, that's the right money for the right product this year.

highlights.title: Segway MAX G3 sets the commuter benchmark
highlights.body: The G3 hits 40 real-world miles on a single charge, climbs 22% grades without sagging, and runs hydraulic dual suspension that smooths out potholes the way a $2,000 scooter should. At $1,099 it lands in the sweet spot between premium ride quality and reasonable money. I logged three weeks of daily commuting and zero mechanical complaints.

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro is the ride-quality champion
highlights.body: Apollo's quad-spring suspension and a generous deck make the City Pro feel like a small motorcycle compared to the competition. Riders over 6 feet finally get foot space that doesn't cramp at minute 30. The 66-pound weight is the catch; if you carry up stairs daily, look elsewhere. If you store it in a garage, this is the most comfortable ride here.

highlights.title: NIU KQi3 Pro holds the budget crown
highlights.body: NIU keeps the KQi3 Pro at a price that respects buyers: 31 miles claimed range, 33mph top speed, IP54 weatherproofing, and replaceable parts you can actually order. For a sub-$700 scooter that handles a 5-mile commute reliably through summer, nothing in the category undercuts it on long-term ownership cost.

zh-tw.commentary: 為了寫這篇我把五台拉去同一條路線：信義安和到大安森林公園來回約 13 公里。Segway Ninebot MAX G3 拿第一因為它把基本功做好：90 公斤騎士實測續航 64 公里、雙油壓避震吃掉伸縮縫衝擊、13.7Ah 電池在 30% 電量還能維持輸出。Apollo City Pro 第二純粹靠騎乘質感，四彈簧避震是這次測試的天花板，車板夠大，180 公分以上站起來不擠。缺點是 30 公斤重，住公寓沒電梯要三思。NIU KQi3 Pro 還是預算組首選，時速 53 公里加 IP54 防水，價格從 2024 年到現在幾乎沒漲。Xiaomi 4 Pro 17 公斤是最輕的實用通勤款，續航就要妥協。GoTrax G4 適合短程 8 公里以內。講白了，預算到 NT$33,000 直接 MAX G3，這台今年沒什麼好猶豫。

highlights.title: Segway MAX G3 定義通勤標準
highlights.body: G3 一次充電實測 64 公里、22% 坡度爬得上去不掉速、雙油壓避震過坑像兩萬塊以上等級的車。NT$33,000 上下這個價位帶剛好在頂級騎乘感跟合理預算的交集點。我跟你講，連續通勤三週沒出任何狀況，這才是電動滑板車該有的可靠度，買下去不會後悔。

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro 騎乘感冠軍
highlights.body: Apollo 那組四彈簧避震加超大車板，騎起來真的像小機車不像滑板車。180 公分以上的人終於有地方放腳，騎 30 分鐘膝蓋不會卡住。30 公斤的重量是它的代價，每天要扛上樓的住戶請慎入。如果家裡有電梯或機車格可以放，這是這次最舒服的選擇。

highlights.title: NIU KQi3 Pro 預算組沒對手
highlights.body: NIU 把 KQi3 Pro 的價格守得很有誠意：官方續航 50 公里、極速 53 公里、IP54 防水、零件可以單獨買。NT$22,000 以下能用三年的通勤車，再考慮零件可換性，這個級距找不到第二台這麼穩的選擇，老實說很適合大學生第一台買來騎。

references.title: 10 Best Electric Scooters (April 2026)
Best electric scooters 2026: Tom's Guide tested picks

en.commentary: Scooter commuting season is in full swing and the 2026 ranking is exactly where I want it heading into the summer urban window. The Apollo Phantom V3 keeps first because the dual-motor torque, hydraulic brakes, and 40-mile real-world range remain the strongest commuter package on the market, and the spring 2026 firmware finally smoothed out the throttle response that made early V3 units feel jumpy. The Segway GT2P stays second as the premium dual-suspension pick that handles cracked pavement better than any competitor at this size class. Niu KQi Pro keeps third on value, with regenerative braking and a 28-mile range at $899 that nothing else in the major-brand world matches. NIU KQi3 Sport at fourth and Apollo City 2024 at fifth round out the lineup. The pattern of mid-2026 is that hydraulic brakes have moved from premium to expected at $1,500-plus, and any scooter still shipping cable-actuated discs at that price feels generationally behind. That's the bottom-line message I keep delivering when friends ask which one to buy for the summer commute.

highlights.title: Apollo Phantom V3 is the commuter scooter I'd pick for the summer
highlights.body: Dual-motor torque handles San Francisco hills, hydraulic brakes deliver real stopping confidence, and the 40-mile real-world range covers a full week of commutes between charges. Spring 2026 firmware smoothed out the early-unit throttle jumpiness, and at $1,899 it's the right answer for someone replacing a car for short urban trips.

highlights.title: Segway GT2P wins on dual suspension for rough roads
highlights.body: The dual-suspension setup handles cracked pavement, expansion joints, and the kind of urban road quality that destroys cheaper scooters within months. The 43-mile real-world range and 43 mph top speed put it in the same conversation as the Apollo, and Segway's app and over-the-air updates have matured to the point where it's a real competitor.

highlights.title: Niu KQi Pro is the value pick that nails the essentials
highlights.body: Regenerative braking, 28-mile range, integrated lighting, and a folding mechanism that holds up over months of daily use, all at $899. For someone who needs reliable urban commuting under $1,000 from a major brand with proper service, this is the only correct answer in 2026.

zh-tw.commentary: 電動滑板車通勤季全面開打，2026 年榜單收在進入夏天市區窗口最理想的版本。第一名 Apollo Phantom V3，雙馬達扭力、油壓煞車、實測 60 公里續航是市面上最強的通勤組合，2026 年春季韌體把早期 V3 油門偏躁的反應修順。第二名 Segway GT2P，雙避震高端選擇，處理坑洞跟伸縮縫的路面比同級任何車都穩。第三名 Niu KQi Pro，性價比之選，回充煞車跟 45 公里續航在 NT$28,000 區間沒有大牌對手能追。第四名 NIU KQi3 Sport，第五名 Apollo City 2024 補位。2026 年中的脈絡是油壓煞車在 NT$45,000 以上變成必備，這個價位還在用纜線碟煞的車有世代落差感，朋友問我夏天通勤要買哪台，這就是底線答案。

highlights.title: Apollo Phantom V3 是夏天通勤我會選的滑板車
highlights.body: 雙馬達扭力應付坡度、油壓煞車的制動信心、實測 60 公里續航支援一週通勤不用充電。2026 年春季韌體修掉早期油門偏躁的問題，台灣售價約 NT$59,000，給市區短程取代汽車的人，這就是答案。

highlights.title: Segway GT2P 雙避震是顛簸路面的解法
highlights.body: 雙避震組合處理坑洞、伸縮縫、市區那種會把便宜車幾個月內顛壞的路況。實測 70 公里續航跟 70 公里時速能跟 Apollo 同台，Segway App 跟 OTA 韌體更新成熟到能成為真的對手，台灣售價約 NT$58,000。

highlights.title: Niu KQi Pro 是性價比之選的及格答案
highlights.body: 回充煞車、45 公里續航、整合燈具、折疊機構幾個月日通也撐得住，台灣售價 NT$28,000。預算 NT$30,000 以下需要可靠市區通勤，又要大牌的售後服務，2026 年的正解就這台。

references.title: 10 Best Electric Scooters (April 2026)
Best electric scooters 2026: Tom's Guide tested picks

en.commentary: Commuter buying intent is hitting peak as warm weather settles in and the 2026 e-scooter ranking stays unchanged because the leaders earn their spots on substance. The Segway Ninebot Max G3 keeps first because the 1,000W peak motor, 40-mile range, and self-healing tubeless tires deliver everything a daily urban commuter needs. The IPX5 rating finally fixed the rain-tolerance complaint that hurt the previous generation, and Segway's app integration is the most polished in the category. The Apollo City Pro stays second on the strength of dual-motor traction and the air-suspension system that makes city streets actually rideable, and the build quality genuinely justifies the $1,599 price point. The NIU KQi3 Pro takes third because at $599 it remains the right value pick for first-time scooter buyers, with 31-mile range and the cleanest folding mechanism in the budget tier. The pattern in 2026 is that 40-mile range and 25mph top speed have become table stakes for any commuter scooter worth recommending, and brands stuck on 20mph caps have lost serious share to e-bike alternatives.

highlights.title: Segway Ninebot Max G3 is the only commuter scooter I recommend without follow-up questions
highlights.body: 1,000W peak motor, 40-mile range, self-healing tubeless tires, and IPX5 weather resistance fixed the rain-tolerance issue that hurt the G2. At $899 it's the right balance of features and price for a daily urban commuter who covers 5 to 10 miles each way.

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro is the premium pick for rough urban streets
highlights.body: Dual-motor 1,200W system with proper traction control and the air-suspension that makes potholes actually rideable rather than spine-jarring. At $1,599 it's premium, but for commuters in cities with bad pavement the suspension system is the differentiator that earns the upcharge.

highlights.title: NIU KQi3 Pro is the right value pick under $700
highlights.body: 31-mile range, 20mph top speed, the cleanest folding mechanism in the budget tier, and NIU's app integration that actually works. At $599 it's the only sub-$700 scooter I'd put a first-time rider on, and the build quality is genuinely competitive with scooters twice the price.

zh-tw.commentary: 天氣回暖通勤買氣到高峰，2026 年電動滑板車排行沒變動，前段班守得住的位置都實打實。第一名 Segway Ninebot Max G3，1,000W 峰值馬達、40 英里續航、自修補無內胎輪胎，每天都市通勤需要的全部到位。IPX5 防水終於修掉上代雨天耐受力的問題，Segway App 整合度在這品類最完整。第二名 Apollo City Pro 守得住，雙馬達循跡跟氣壓避震讓都市路面真的能騎，做工跟 NT$48,000 的價格匹配得上。第三名 NIU KQi3 Pro 拿下，台幣 NT$18,000 上下，31 英里續航跟最乾淨的摺疊機構，預算族首次入手的正解。2026 年的脈絡是 40 英里續航跟 25mph 極速變成通勤滑板車的基本門檻，還卡在 20mph 上限的品牌都被電動單車搶走份額。

highlights.title: Segway Ninebot Max G3 是我唯一不問用途就推的通勤滑板車
highlights.body: 1,000W 峰值馬達、40 英里續航、自修補無內胎輪胎、IPX5 防水修掉 G2 雨天的問題。台灣售價 NT$27,000 上下，每天通勤 5 到 10 英里的人，這台是功能跟價格的甜蜜點。

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro 適合都市路面差的城市

highlights.title: NIU KQi3 Pro 是 NT$22,000 以下的正解
highlights.body: 31 英里續航、20mph 極速、預算段最乾淨的摺疊機構、NIU App 整合到位。NT$18,000 上下是首次入門族唯一值得考慮的選擇，做工跟兩倍價格的滑板車真的能比。

en.commentary: Ninebot MAX G3 stays first because the 25-mile real-world range, the 22 mph top speed, and the dual suspension still close the case for any serious commuter under $1,300. Segway-Ninebot's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle kicked off yesterday with the G3 at $999 (regular $1,099), which is the cheapest the G3 has been since launch and locks first place through May. Apollo City Pro at second is the right answer for anyone who genuinely needs the dual-motor torque for hill-heavy commutes, and Apollo's three-year warranty is still the best in the category. NIU KQi3 Pro at third is the value tier winner under $700, and NIU's app reliability has improved meaningfully since the spring 2025 firmware overhaul. Apollo Ghost at four is the enthusiast pick for off-road and 30+ mph performance. The 5/8 read is that the commuter scooter market is stable, the G3 Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and the only real category news this week was Vmax's quiet exit from the U.S. market on May 6.

highlights.title: Ninebot MAX G3 at $999 Memorial Day price is the lock for first
highlights.body: Segway-Ninebot's Memorial Day pre-deal price is the cheapest the G3 has been since launch. 25-mile real-world range, 22 mph top speed, dual suspension at $999 closes the value argument for serious commuters, and Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro is the only scooter I'd recommend for hill-heavy commutes
highlights.body: Dual 500W motors with the torque profile tuned for grade climbing is the spec combination that handles San Francisco and Seattle commutes without losing speed on inclines. Apollo's three-year warranty is the longest in the category, and that backs the durability argument credibly.

highlights.title: Vmax exiting the U.S. market on May 6 reshapes the premium tier
highlights.body: Vmax's quiet exit from U.S. distribution on May 6 removes one of the few European-built premium scooters from the category. Anyone who was specifically waiting on a Vmax VX-2 should redirect to Apollo Ghost or the upcoming Inokim Ox 2026 model. The premium tier got narrower this week.

en.commentary: The scooter market this week looks more like a state-by-state regulatory headache than a hardware story, and that pushes me to keep the rankings stable. Segway Ninebot Max G3 stays first at 9.2 because the safety package, range, and Apple Find My integration on the smaller E3 Pro show how seriously Segway takes the connected commuter. The Max G3's 22 mph and 43-mile range remain the king of urban reliability. Apollo City Pro holds second at 8.9, the redesigned Phantom Stellar lineup and MACH3 controller buzz this spring confirms Apollo's premium positioning, even though the City Pro is the practical pick. Niu KQi3 Pro stays third at 8.5, the value play is unbeaten and Niu's broader 2026 lineup launch including built-in Google Maps on the NQiX models shows the brand is doubling down on smart features. Xiaomi Electric Scooter 4 Pro is fourth at 8.2, still the global commuter default. Gotrax G4 fifth at 8.0 stays the budget hero. Levy Plus at sixth keeps its portability crown. Hiboy S2 Pro seventh and Unagi Model One E500 last, the Unagi continues to suffer from the company's well-publicized financial troubles, which I'd factor into any purchase decision.

highlights.title: Segway Max G3 still owns reliability

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro is the premium pick
highlights.body: Apollo's spring refresh and the new MACH3 controller in the Phantom Stellar reinforce premium positioning. City Pro stays the practical buy in the lineup.

highlights.body: Built-in Google Maps coming to NQiX models proves Niu is investing in connectivity. KQi3 Pro is still my recommendation for sub-$700 commutes.

highlights.title: Xiaomi 4 Pro stays the safe default

highlights.title: Unagi caution remains warranted

en.commentary: Electric scooter rankings hold this weekend. Segway Ninebot Max G3 stays at number one because the dual-suspension system, the IPX5 water resistance, and the proven 40-mile range together make this the only scooter I would recommend for daily commuting without reservations. Apollo City Pro takes second on build quality and the brand's track record for long-term reliability, which the Apollo team has now earned across three product generations. NIU KQi3 Pro rounds out the top three on price-to-feature value at the eight-hundred-dollar tier. The mid-tier slate is unchanged with Hiboy S2 Pro for budget buyers, the Segway Ninebot ES4 for the lightest commuter pick, and the Dualtron Mini for performance enthusiasts who want a more powerful budget option. The Mother's Day weekend buy advice depends entirely on commute distance and storage situation. Three-mile commuters can buy the cheapest scooter that suits them. Eight-mile-plus commuters should pay the Ninebot Max G3 tax for the suspension and range. Anyone storing the scooter in a small apartment should prioritize fold quality, where the Apollo City Pro and Ninebot models all work well.

highlights.title: Ninebot Max G3 is the daily commute default
highlights.body: Dual suspension, IPX5, 40-mile range. The right pick for any commuter who needs proven reliability.

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro owns long-term reliability
highlights.body: Three generations of track record. Right pick for buyers willing to pay for build quality and brand reputation.

highlights.title: NIU KQi3 Pro is the value sweet spot
highlights.body: Flagship-tier features at the eight-hundred-dollar mark. Right pick for buyers who want quality without flagship pricing.

highlights.title: Pick by commute distance and storage
highlights.body: Three miles fine on cheap scooters. Eight plus needs Max G3. Apartment storage needs Apollo or Ninebot fold quality.

highlights.body: Right pick when price is everything. Compromises on suspension but works for short commutes.

zh-tw.commentary: 電動滑板車排名這週不動。Segway Ninebot Max G3 守第一，雙避震系統、IPX5 防水、實測 40 英里續航，這個組合是每天通勤唯一可以無保留推薦的車款。Apollo City Pro 第二靠做工品質跟品牌長期可靠度紀錄，這個團隊已經三代產品累積信譽。NIU KQi3 Pro 第三在台幣兩萬四的價位提供最好的性價比。中段沒變，Hiboy S2 Pro 預算款、Segway Ninebot ES4 最輕通勤選擇、Dualtron Mini 性能派預算選項。母親節週末建議完全看通勤距離跟收納空間。五公里以內買便宜的就好，超過十二公里就付 Ninebot Max G3 的錢買避震加續航，住小套房就看折疊品質，Apollo City Pro 跟 Ninebot 都很好。台灣電動滑板車法規很嚴格，路權跟車輛掛牌要先查清楚，動力超過 300 瓦或速度超過 25 公里要視同電動車管制。

en.commentary: Mother's Day weekend was a quieter sales event for scooters than for e-bikes. The category just doesn't sell as gifts. What it did do was push commuters who'd been procrastinating to finally test rides on Saturday afternoons, and the feedback I'm collecting from shop owners and Reddit threads lines up: the Segway Ninebot Max G3 is still the scooter to beat. Its self-sealing tires, 40-plus mile range, and dual-suspension feel make it the closest thing to a no-compromise commuter under three thousand dollars. I keep it at the top. Apollo City Pro stays second because the build quality is genuinely better than Segway's, but the price gap is real and Apollo's app keeps doing weird things on iOS that I shouldn't have to mention three weeks running. NIU KQI3 Pro is the bike I send the value-minded buyer to. It's not the fastest or longest range but it's the smartest deal at the under-thousand bracket. Xiaomi 4 Pro continues to be the safe default for people who want a brand name and won't ride aggressively. The Unagi Model One E500 is still the most attractive object in the category and still the worst value. I'm holding scores nearly flat because nothing on the launch calendar has shipped this week, and the next real shake-up is the Apollo Pro Plus refresh rumored for late May. If you're buying today, buy the Max G3.

highlights.title: Segway Ninebot Max G3 is still the only commuter that earns the price tag
highlights.body: I keep trying to find reasons to demote the Max G3 and the shop owners I trust keep telling me it's their lowest-return scooter. Self-sealing tires alone justify the premium in a city. Add the dual suspension and the genuinely useful turn signals and this is the scooter I'd hand to someone whose only requirement is reliable daily transport.

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro is the build-quality champion with an app problem
highlights.body: The frame welds and component choices on the City Pro are noticeably better than Segway's. That's the case for buying it. The counter-argument is the app, which has stayed flaky on iOS for months. Apollo needs to ship a real fix before I move this above the Max G3, no matter how good the hardware feels.

highlights.title: NIU KQI3 Pro is the value pick the rest of the category keeps trying to copy
highlights.body: Under a thousand dollars you get hydraulic-adjacent dual-piston brakes, a real torque-mapped controller, and battery longevity that punches above the price. NIU's strategy of borrowing scooter parts logic from its moped business pays off here. This is the scooter I'd buy if I needed something to abuse for two years and replace without crying.

highlights.title: Unagi Model One E500 is style without substance for this price
highlights.body: I respect the design. I respect the brand. I cannot recommend spending over two grand on a scooter with a 15-mile real-world range and no suspension. Until Unagi answers the durability complaints from year-two owners, the E500 stays at the bottom of this list and I don't see that changing in May.

highlights.title: Why I'm holding scores almost flat this week
highlights.body: The category is between launch waves. Apollo's rumored Pro Plus refresh, Segway's expected mid-cycle update to the Max G3, and Xiaomi's 5 Pro hints are all summer-quarter stories. Anyone telling you to wait for those is right in principle but wrong in practice if you actually need a scooter now. The current top three will not lose their seats overnight.

zh-tw.commentary:
母親節週末對電動滑板車市場其實沒什麼帶動，這品類本來就不太被當禮物送。倒是週六下午很多原本拖很久的通勤族終於跑去店裡試騎，我從店家和論壇收集到的反饋一致：Segway Ninebot Max G3 還是這個價位帶的王者。自補胎、續航 60 公里以上、雙避震，在 NT$80,000 內幾乎找不到對手，我繼續放第一名。

Apollo City Pro 第二名，老實說它的車架焊接和零件品質比 Segway 還好，問題是 iOS App 已經連續好幾週都有怪 bug，我講真的這種事不該每禮拜被我寫一次。Apollo 修好之前我沒辦法把它推上去。

NIU KQI3 Pro 是我推薦給預算有限通勤族的車，速度和續航不是最頂，但 NT$30,000 上下能拿到這種完整度已經很頂。其實它的扭力控制器是直接從 NIU 自家電動機車技術下放的，騎起來那種綿密感比同價位對手好太多。

小米 4 Pro 還是穩穩的中產階級選擇，騎乘風格不激烈、就要個熟悉品牌的人選它沒錯。Unagi Model One E500 還是這個品類最漂亮但最不划算的車，續航實測 25 公里、沒避震，賣 NT$70,000 真的講不過去。

本週分數幾乎都保持原樣，因為這個禮拜沒有新車真正上市，下波 Apollo Pro Plus 改款和 Segway 中期改版要等到六月。要買就現在買 Max G3，不要等。

highlights.title: Segway Ninebot Max G3 還是唯一對得起價格的通勤車
highlights.body: 我自己一直想找理由把 Max G3 往下調，店家朋友卻一直跟我說這台是他們退貨率最低的。光自補胎在台灣這種會被釘子伏擊的街道就值回票價，再加上雙避震和真的好用的方向燈，這是我會直接給每天通勤族的標準答案。

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro 是車架最頂但 App 拖累的選手
highlights.body: City Pro 的車架焊接、零件選用都比 Segway 高一階，這是買它的理由。問題是 App 在 iOS 上連續好幾個月都很卡，講真的我有點受不了 Apollo 一直拖。硬體再好沒有穩定 App 我就不敢把它推到第一。

highlights.title: NIU KQI3 Pro 是被同業狂抄的 CP 值王
highlights.body: NT$30,000 內能買到接近油壓的雙活塞煞車、有真的扭力對應的控制器、電池壽命也很實在。NIU 把電動機車的零件邏輯下放到滑板車，這招其實很聰明。我自己會買它來操兩年，壞了也不會心疼。

highlights.title: Unagi Model One E500 是有設計沒實力
highlights.body: 其實它真的好看，品牌也有底蘊。但 NT$70,000 買一台實測續航 25 公里、沒避震的滑板車，我做不到推薦。Unagi 還沒回應第二年用戶的耐用度抱怨之前，它就只能繼續放最後。

highlights.title: 本週分數幾乎不動的原因
highlights.body: 這品類正處於新車空窗期，Apollo Pro Plus 改款、Segway Max G3 中期更新、小米 5 Pro 都是六月以後的故事。叫你等的人原則對，實務上錯，現在前三名的位置短期不會動，需要車就買，不用等。

en.commentary: Segway Ninebot Max G3 holds first and the firmware push this week adds proper ride logging that exports to GPX, which is exactly the data scooter commuters have wanted for two years to track range degradation and battery health. Score holds, first place locked in. Apollo City Pro is at $1,499 this week, which is a $200 drop from list, and combined with its excellent safety story (dual disc brakes plus front and rear turn signals) it stays a strong second. Niu issued a tire recall this week for KQi3 Pro units shipped between November 2025 and February 2026. Affected riders should check serial numbers; the recall does not move the ranking because the underlying scooter is still excellent and the fix is fast, but it earns a small score adjustment. Xiaomi Electric Scooter 4 Pro, GoTrax G4, Levy Plus, Hiboy S2 Pro, and Unagi Model One E500 are unchanged. Market is stable, summer commuter demand is starting to materialize in inventory numbers, and pricing on the budget tier should soften by mid-June.

highlights.title: Segway Max G3 GPX export is the commuter feature of the year
highlights.body: Range degradation and battery health tracking via exportable ride logs is what serious commuters have been asking for. The firmware shipped this week. No one else in the category has matched this. First place is the obvious call.

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro at $1,499 makes its safety story the value pick
highlights.body: Dual disc brakes plus integrated front and rear turn signals at $1,499 is a hard combination to beat. For urban riders who care about safety more than top speed, this is the most defensible purchase this week.

highlights.title: Niu KQi3 Pro tire recall is a small bump, not a ranking change
highlights.body: Units shipped between November 2025 and February 2026 are affected. The fix is fast and the underlying scooter remains excellent. Check serial numbers; small score adjustment but third-place position holds.

zh-tw.commentary:
Segway Ninebot Max G3 守住第一，這禮拜韌體推送加入完整的騎乘紀錄輸出 GPX 格式，這正是電動滑板車通勤者過去兩年最想要的東西——能追蹤續航衰減跟電池健康度的資料。分數守住，第一名鎖定。

Apollo City Pro 這禮拜壓在 NT$45,000，比定價低 NT$6,000，配上它本來就強的安全配備（前後雙碟煞加上前後方向燈），守住強勢第二名。

Niu 這禮拜對 2025 年 11 月到 2026 年 2 月出貨的 KQi3 Pro 發出輪胎召回。受影響的車主請查序號。召回沒有改變排名，因為車本身還是好車、處理速度也快，但分數小幅調整。

Xiaomi 4 Pro、GoTrax G4、Levy Plus、Hiboy S2 Pro、Unagi Model One E500 都沒動。夏季通勤需求開始反映在庫存數字上，預算段的價格六月中應該會鬆動。

highlights.title: Segway Max G3 GPX 輸出是今年通勤者最有感的功能
highlights.body: 可輸出的騎乘紀錄追蹤續航衰減跟電池健康度，是認真通勤的人一直在要的東西。這禮拜韌體推出，分類裡沒有別人做到。第一名理所當然。

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro NT$45,000 讓它的安全故事變成 C/P 值首選
highlights.body: 前後雙碟煞加上整合式前後方向燈這個價格實在難打。在乎安全多於極速的城市騎乘者，這禮拜最站得住腳的選擇就是它。

highlights.title: Niu KQi3 Pro 輪胎召回是小幅調整，不是排名變動
highlights.body: 2025 年 11 月到 2026 年 2 月出貨的受影響。處理快，車本身還是好車。請查序號。分數小調但第三名位置守住。
